chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1619 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 19-04-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-SMC. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the respondents-SMC files statement, which reflects that petitioner has already received pension difference amount i.e. Rs. 52,764/- vide cheque dated 30.08.2021 and now she is getting her increased pension regularly; copy of the statement is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner, who being satisfied, does not press this petition further. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
